requirement_topic.en: EWA Grid-Connection and Net-Metering Material Approval
requirement_topic.zh: EWA并网及净计量物料认可
requirement_topic.zht: EWA併網及淨計量物料認可

summary.en: The Electricity and Water Authority (EWA) operates Bahrain's electricity network and administers the net-metering scheme established by Cabinet Resolution No. 2 of 2017. EWA maintains a list of approved solar PV materials, including inverters, through its Solar PV Material-Approval process. Only inverters on the EWA-approved materials list may be used in net-metering and grid-connected installations. EWA-approved consultants and contractors must be engaged for system design and installation. All related service applications are handled via the Benayat electronic platform. EWA has set 300 MW as a net-metering capacity target for 2026, with 50 MW already connected and a further 150 MW in progress as of available reporting.
summary.zh: 巴林水电局（EWA）负责运营巴林电力网络，并管理根据2017年内阁第2号决议建立的净计量方案。EWA通过光伏物料认可流程维护经认可的光伏材料（包括逆变器）名单。只有列入EWA认可材料名单的逆变器方可用于净计量和并网装置。系统设计和安装必须聘用EWA认可的顾问和承包商。所有相关服务申请均通过Benayat电子平台处理。EWA设定了2026年300MW净计量容量目标，据现有报告已完成50MW并网，另有150MW正在推进。
summary.zht: 巴林水電局（EWA）負責運營巴林電力網絡，並管理根據2017年內閣第2號決議建立的淨計量方案。EWA通過光伏物料認可流程維護經認可的光伏材料（包括逆變器）名單。只有列入EWA認可材料名單的逆變器方可用於淨計量和併網裝置。系統設計和安裝必須聘用EWA認可的顧問和承包商。所有相關服務申請均通過Benayat電子平台處理。EWA設定了2026年300MW淨計量容量目標，據現有報告已完成50MW併網，另有150MW正在推進。

standards_or_laws: Cabinet Resolution No. 2 of 2017 (Bahrain Net Metering Policy, published in National Gazette 28 December 2017)
EWA approved consultants and contractors requirements
EWA grid technical requirements for distributed renewable energy generation

summary.en: China grid-connected inverters are subject to GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power station grid interconnection and GB/T 37408-2019 inverter technical specifications. Chinese domestic utility interconnection rules do not satisfy EWA material-approval or net-metering requirements in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国并网逆变器须符合光伏发电站并网技术规定GB/T 19964-2024和逆变器技术规范GB/T 37408-2019。中国国内并网规则不能满足巴林EWA物料认可或净计量要求。
summary.zht: 中國併網逆變器須符合光伏發電站併網技術規定GB/T 19964-2024和逆變器技術規範GB/T 37408-2019。中國國內併網規則不能滿足巴林EWA物料認可或淨計量要求。

gap.en: Inverters must be listed on the EWA-approved materials register before installation in Bahrain net-metering or grid-connected projects. Engage an EWA-approved consultant to confirm the application route via the Benayat platform. China GB/T grid-code compliance does not substitute for EWA approval.
gap.zh: 逆变器在安装于巴林净计量或并网项目前，必须列入EWA认可材料登记册。聘用EWA认可顾问，通过Benayat平台确认申请路径。中国GB/T并网合规性不能替代EWA批准。
gap.zht: 逆變器在安裝於巴林淨計量或併網項目前，必須列入EWA認可材料登記冊。聘用EWA認可顧問，通過Benayat平台確認申請路徑。中國GB/T併網合規性不能替代EWA批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for net-metering and grid-connected solar PV installations in Bahrain; EWA material-approval listing required before installation
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 19964-2024 is a recommended standard; grid connection requires utility approval under China electricity regulations

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EWA material-approval listing is the mandatory gate for inverters in Bahrain net-metering and grid-connected installations. Apply via the EWA Benayat platform with an EWA-approved consultant before supplying inverters to any Bahrain solar project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EWA物料认可备案是巴林净计量和并网装置逆变器的强制性准入关口。在向任何巴林太阳能项目供应逆变器前，通过EWA Benayat平台与EWA认可顾问合作提出申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EWA物料認可備案是巴林淨計量和併網裝置逆變器的強制性准入關口。在向任何巴林太陽能項目供應逆變器前，通過EWA Benayat平台與EWA認可顧問合作提出申請。
